---
title: "Modernization Validation Suites"
subtitle: "Cross-adapter validation approach per technology domain"
doc-type: landing
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/modernization-registry.yaml"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
aspirational: true
---

::: {.callout-important title="Content pending"}
This section is part of the customer-documents skeleton but has not yet been
authored. The domain slugs below are reserved; content will land in line
with the [Customer Documents Roadmap](../ROADMAP.qmd). For per-adapter
validation material that is already available, see
[Adapter Validation Suites](../adapter-validation-suites/index.qmd).
:::

Modernization Validation Suites describe how to validate domain-level
modernization outcomes — evidence expectations, drift checks, and end-to-end
acceptance criteria that span multiple adapters within a domain.

## Planned domains

| Slug | Domain |
|---|---|
| `cloud/mvs-cloud.md` | Cloud modernization validation |
| `identity/mvs-identity.md` | Identity modernization validation |
| `sase/mvs-sase.md` | SASE validation |
| `sdwan/mvs-sdwan.md` | SD-WAN validation |
| `telemetry/mvs-telemetry.md` | Telemetry correlation validation |
| `zero-trust/mvs-zero-trust.md` | Zero-trust enforcement validation |
| `_template/mvs-generic-template.md` | Generic MVS authoring template |
